title: Snapscream
description: Take a camera and take photos of anomalies!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a716f3ef6d5cd3984331c16e998d1705ca94605e.png)

**Take a camera and take photos of anomalies!**

Snapscream is a Minecraft modpack with a collection of horror mods and with the addition of the mod called Exposure, which allows players to take photos of the terrifying things to find in this modpack. The pack also features some quality-of-life and performance mods to improve the general gameplay quality of Minecraft. A really good visual shader (optional) comes with these mods too!
